title: BambooTools
description: Makes bamboo actually have a use!
body:
**This mod supports `3` mod loaders. Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge. Any file ending in `FAB` is a Fabric file, `NEO` is a NeoForge file, and `FORGE` is a Forge file.**

**This mod supports Bedrock Edition! Bedrock edition can be downloaded on our website!**

Bamboo is kinda useless unless you're building... So we made it useful! This mod lets you do more with bamboo, like make armor, make tools, and make more blocks!

# INFORMATION
BambooTools is a Minecraft: Java Edition, Fabric, 1.21.8 mod that makes the wonderfull bamboo block have more of a use. Yes we have bamboo doors, slabs, etc. But it's not enough! So we made this mod make bamboo actually have a better use.

# HOW IT WORKS
Take your normal bamboo fron the jungle, put it in a crafting grid like planks to a crafting table. Take the compressed bamboo block and smelt it. When you smelt it, you can then make your items.

# WHAT WE MADE
Bamboo Sword, Pickaxe, Ladder, Mace, Core, and more!

# HOW TO INSTALL/DOWNLOAD
Use a client that lets you use Fabric loader. Lunar Client or Feather Client being a good option. Select the version `1.21.8`. After you have your fabric loader all setup and ready, download the latest version of the mod (recommended for the best experience), put it in your mods folder, launch the game (if already launched, close and reopen), then it should be good to go!

# BUG REPORT/SUPPORT
We have a Discord server for you to get help, report bugs, suggest mods, and suggest things to be added into mods. You can join it [here](https://discord.gg/6m8gw3KQQM).
